rulings.Case Title: BARRETT BLOCK PARTNERS, L.P., A CALIFORNIA VS. KENNETH SHARP et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn & Mtn For Order Granting Leave To File 1st Amended Complaint
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON MONDAY, FEBRUARY 11, 2008 LINE 7. PLAINTIFF BARRETT BLOCK PARTNERS, L.P.'S MOTION For Order Granting Leave To File FIRST Amended Complaint IS GRANTED IN PART AND DENIED IN PART. PLAINTIFF MAY FILE AN AMENDED COMPLAINT WITH THE FIRST TWO CAUSES OF ACTION, BUT NOT THE THIRD CAUSE OF ACTION, WHICH SEEKS TO STATE A CLAIM FOR NEGLIGENT BREACH OF A CONTRACTUAL DUTY. =(302/PJB)
